chunks.text: Course: EE 229A | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 229A. Information Theory and Coding Catalog Description: Fundamental bounds of Shannon theory and their application. Source and channel coding theorems. Galois field theory, algebraic error-correction codes. Private and public-key cryptographic systems. Units: 3 Also Offered As: ELENG 229A Prerequisites: 226 recommended, Statistics 200A or equivalent. Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: Yes Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
